title: Paul Y'Barbo
compiled_truth: Paul Y'Barbo is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-27 to 2002-05-06), Paul Y'Barbo sent 222 and received 1073 emails, totalling 1295 interactions. Top correspondents: [Wayne Perry](people/wayne-perry) (41), [Clay Harris](people/clay-harris) (35), [Dan Masters](people/dan-masters) (27), [Miguel Maltes](people/miguel-maltes) (22), [Greg Curran](people/greg-curran) (21).
